title: ranunculus lobulatus
intro: Ranunculus lobulatus, also known as lobed buttercup, is a perennial plant species in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae) native to eastern North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ranunculus lobulatus include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Ranunculus lobulatus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote healing and alleviate symptoms.
